# osdgoogle_machine_types (Data Source)

List of GCP machine types available for OSD clusters. Uses the OCM global catalog (no GCP credentials required). Note: validation is not region-specific; use availability_zones on machine pools to pin bare metal types to supported zones.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `gcp_project_id` (String) GCP project ID. Kept for compatibility; global catalog is not project-specific.
- `region` (String) GCP region (e.g., us-central1). Kept for compatibility; global catalog is not region-filtered.

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) List of GCP machine types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Machine type ID.
- `name` (String) Machine type name.
